rules.rule: Never add new methods to legacy class-based wrappers (Shape, Solid, Edge, Face, Wire, Shell, Compound, CompSolid classes). These are frozen OO wrappers. All new functionality goes in *Fns.ts files (e.g. wrapperFns.ts, compoundOpsFns.ts).
New topology operations should be pure functions in *Fns.ts files that take/return branded types. Follow the pattern in wrapperFns.ts and compoundOpsFns.ts.
Use castShape from topology/cast.ts for shape type narrowing. Prefer isSolid(), isFace(), isWire() etc. type guards over manual type checks.
